title: cephaelis hastisepala
intro: Cephaelis hastisepala, also known as the white panax or white and yellow panax, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant contains a number of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Cephaelis hastisepala include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and improve overall health. Cephaelis hastisepala can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues.
